quests.title: iDecision Platform
quests.subtitle: STAGE 01 // DEPLOYED FINTECH ARCHITECTURE
quests.challenge: Legacy loan servicing and AML compliance systems were extremely complex, slow, and error-prone. Credit operators took an average of 45 minutes to process a single application, causing bottleneck issues across financial institutions.
quests.solution: Re-architected the entire loan application pipeline into a unified, high-contrast usability dashboard. Built automated credit-scoring trackers, responsive inline data verification alerts, and a streamlined AML risk checklist directly aligned to UI states.

metrics.label: Approval Speed
metrics.desc: Reduction in overall loan validation & decision times.

metrics.label: Data Accuracy
metrics.desc: Decrease in human operator input and AML filing mistakes.

metrics.label: Scale Deployed
metrics.desc: Enterprise micro-frontends active across major regional institutions.

quests.title: Enterprise Design System
quests.subtitle: STAGE 02 // MULTI-PLATFORM COMPONENT LIBRARY
quests.challenge: Fragmented product teams designed buttons, cards, and modal components in isolation. This caused severe design debt, structural layout inconsistencies, and frontend code redundancy across 3 major product lines.
quests.solution: Designed and engineered a centralized, highly accessible Figma UI component library linked to strict JSON design tokens. Set up automatic dev handoff guidelines, Figma token-sync pipelines, and synchronized component blueprints with React and native iOS teams.

metrics.label: Consistency Rating
metrics.desc: Unified branding standards achieved across all portal apps.

metrics.label: CSS Optimization
metrics.desc: Reduction in style sheets and front-end bundle load times.

quests.title: Collection Module Redesign
quests.subtitle: STAGE 03 // FIELD AGENT TRANSACTION WORKFLOW
quests.challenge: Field debt-collectors struggled to operate complex, multi-page financial tracking forms on mobile devices while traveling in areas with extremely poor, intermittent internet access.
quests.solution: Crafted a single-scroll, offline-first mobile web dashboard. Re-designed form patterns to have high-contrast, oversized target click zones, built smart cash receipt ledger prioritizations, and integrated automated local storage transaction queues.

metrics.label: Field Velocity
metrics.desc: Drastic task completion acceleration for mobile collections.

metrics.label: Offline Accuracy
metrics.desc: Offline transaction synchronization rate without data loss.

metrics.label: Usability Rating
metrics.desc: Direct usability satisfaction feedback score from DRAs.
